zh.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Tims於1439年出生在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特。她於1455年與Sir Thomas Whiting在英國英格蘭薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1478年在她的家鄉享年39歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特謝普頓 馬利特。

nameMeanings.name: Tims
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: patronymic from the personal name   Tim   or   Timm  .

variants.name: Tim
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Cambodian Yoeum, Chheang, Noeun, Phoeun, Sambath, Soeun, Sokhom, Sombath, Sovann.  Southeast Asian Lach, Mau, Sophal, Thong, Thy, Leng, Roeun.
German, Dutch, and English: variant of   Timm  .
Cambodian: written ទឹម, corresponding to the Khmer word meaning ‘to yoke animals’.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Tims was born in 1439, in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England. She married Sir Thomas Whiting in 1455, in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1478, in her hometown, at the age of 39, and was buried in Shepton Mallet, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Tims est née en 1439, à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Whiting en 1455, à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1478, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Shepton Mallet, Somerset, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Tims(은)는 1439년 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1455년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에서 Sir Thomas Whiting(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 그녀의 고향에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 셰프턴 맬렛에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Tims родилась в 1439 г. в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Whiting в 1455 г. в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1478 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности шептон маллет, сомирсет, Англия.
